LABEL: 
Eligible Population Indicator: Medicaid Mandatory Coverage Family-Adult — Ever in Calendar Year 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates if the managed care entity is authorized to enroll the mandatory family/adult eligibility 
groups; ever in the calendar year.
